messages.content:
Lockdown continues as so does our effort to help serve food to the hungry. Yesterday we were able to reach out to more than 170+ people. Your constant encouragement and support is our stimuli to go on. Please feel free to contribyte in cash/kind.

GooglePay/PhonePe :9674295015

You may also transfer via NEFT/IMPS. 
Bank Name: Bank of Baroda 
Account holder's name: Anirudha Samal
A/c No.  08740100008195
Account type: Savings
IFSC: BARB0SURYAS

Looking forward to see you all soon in a Covid-19 free world. This too shall pass. Be safe and extend your help to as many as possible.

#LetsWinTogether ##DefeatCoronaVirus #HumanityAboveAll #WeShallOvercome
